##NAMES=Christelite
##RRUFFID=R060792
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=Zn_3_Cu_2_(SO_4_)_2_(OH)_6_·4H_2_O
##LOCALITY=San Francisco mine, Sierra Gorda, Chile
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Bob Jenkins
##DESCRIPTION=Greenish blue bladed crystals associated with hemimorphite and quartz
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by single-crystal X-ray diffraction
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060792
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Single crystal, powder profile is calculated
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 5.422 b: 6.334 c: 10.486 alpha: 94.37 beta: 90.02 gamma: 90.21 volume: 359.02 crystal system: triclinic
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=785
